one_time_description: Agricultural Benefits Trust Annual disbursement - significant increase from prior year
economic_notes: DCN operates a Gas Station, Gravel Pit, and has multiple business entities including Driftpile First Nation Enterprises Inc., Driftpile Business Corporation, Driftpile Construction Services Limited Partnership, Driftpile Timber Management Limited Partnership, and Driftpile Land Holdings Limited Partnership.
notes: Qualified audit opinion issued due to: (1) not all asset retirement obligations have been estimated and recorded, and (2) insufficient audit evidence regarding carrying amount of investments and advances in related First Nation entities. The 2023 comparatives have been restated (Note 3) due to prior period adjustment of $4,679,818 related to Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust remeasurement losses. One consolidated subsidiary: Driftpile Agricultural Settlement Trust. Five entities accounted for under modified equity method. Significant Ottawa Trust Fund ($1,370,183) and Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust ($49,672,062) investments on balance sheet.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
